claimText: No single entity is permitted to hold 10% or more of the paid-up share capital of a Self-Regulatory Organization (SRO).
evidenceExcerpt: No entity shall hold 10% or more of an SRO's paid-up share capital.
distractorHooks: Stating that a promoter or government entity can hold a majority stake

claimText: The responsibilities of Self-Regulatory Organizations (SROs) include framing codes of conduct, resolving disputes, ensuring regulatory compliance, and detecting early warning signals.
evidenceExcerpt: Responsibilities include framing a code of conduct, dispute resolution, and ensuring regulatory compliance.
distractorHooks: Adding statutory powers such as issuing banking licenses or printing currency
Claiming SROs only act as advisory bodies without dispute resolution capabilities

claimText: At least one-third of the Board of Directors of an SRO, including the Chairperson, must be independent.
evidenceExcerpt: At least one-third of Board members, including the Chairperson, must be independent.
distractorHooks: Changing one-third to one-half or two-thirds
Stating that the Chairperson is exempt from the independence requirement
Claiming that all board members must be independent
